TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Paudadan Itiniay i Xincheng Cen no Hualien ko Paudadan a niyaro', 254 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 727 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 72% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 526 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 28% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 201 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 48%, 撒奇拉雅族1%, Bunun 4%, Tayal 4%, Truku 12%, Kebalan 1%, roma 3%.
S.PHON: pao~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan itiniaj i xinʦħəŋ ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u pao~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, ******%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, tajaɾ *%, tro~u~uko~u~u **%, kəb~b~vaɾan *%, ro~uma *%.
S.FORM: Paudadan Itiniay i Xincheng Cen no Hualien ko Paudadan a niyaro', 254 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 727 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 72% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 526 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 28% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 201 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 48%, 撒奇拉雅族1%, Bunun 4%, Tayal 4%, Truku 12%, Kebalan 1%, roma 3%.
S.PHON: pao~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan itiniaj i xinʦħəŋ ʦən no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u pao~u~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, ******%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%, tajaɾ *%, tro~u~uko~u~u **%, kəb~b~vaɾan *%, ro~uma *%.
